fields.label: Client ID
fields.description: TTLock Cloud Open API client ID (from developer portal). Never expose this in browser responses.

fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: TTLock Cloud Open API client secret. Stored encrypted. Never logged or returned to the browser.

fields.label: API Base URL
fields.description: EU endpoint: https://euapi.ttlock.com  |  US endpoint: https://api.ttlock.com

fields.label: Key Type
fields.description: eKey = mobile app key issued to guest phone.  IC Card = physical RFID card via card encoder.

fields.label: Key Name Prefix
fields.description: Prepended to the guest name when naming keys in TTLock (max 32 chars total).

fields.label: Lock ID is Integer
fields.description: TTLock lockId is normally an integer. Disable only if your deployment uses string lock IDs.
